query_description: Count customers by tier using GROUP BY
business_context: Understand customer distribution across service tiers

expected_columns.name: CUSTOMER_COUNT
expected_columns.description: Number of customers in this tier

expected_rows.explanation: Alice and Charlie are both Premium tier

validation_notes: Snowflake stores strings in UPPERCASE by default
Results should be ordered alphabetically by tier
GROUP BY tier ensures all customers with same tier are counted together
No NULL values expected in this sample data
